title: task
description: duty_cycle.py:177-217 - If requested airtime_us exceeds total duty cycle budget (max_airtime = window_us * limit_ratio), function cannot find valid time and falls back to time_until_budget_refill_ms(). But refill won't help if TX is always too large. Returns wait time that won't actually enable transmission.
close_reason: Fixed: next_tx_available_ms() now returns -1 when requested airtime exceeds maximum possible budget (window * limit_ratio). Previously fell through to time_until_budget_refill_ms() which returned a misleading wait time. Added upfront check and updated docstring. Tests added for edge case.
